testcase.name: Chart of Accounts - Comprehensive Tests › [NAVIGATE] To Chart of Accounts module

testcase.name: Chart of Accounts - Comprehensive Tests › [CREATE] Add new account button
testcase.system-out: ✅ Login successful as ACCOUNTANT ✅ Navigating directly to: /accounts Final URL: https://acc.k56mm.uk/accounts ✅ Navigated to: ผังบัญชี ✅ Add Account button found 📸 Screenshot saved: screenshots/comprehensive/accounts/add-account-button.png

testcase.name: Chart of Accounts - Comprehensive Tests › [CREATE] Fill and submit new account form

failure.message: accounts.spec.ts:85:7 [CREATE] Fill and submit new account form

testcase.failure:
[ci-headless] › comprehensive/accounts.spec.ts:85:7 › Chart of Accounts - Comprehensive Tests › [CREATE] Fill and submit new account form
Error: Failed to fetch records from /api/accounts
at comprehensive/test-helpers.ts:285
283 | 284 | if (!result.success) { > 285 | throw new Error(`Failed to fetch records from ${endpoint}`) | ^ 286 | } 287 | 288 | const record = result.data.find((r: any) => r.code === code) at verifyRecordExists (/Users/tong/Thai-acc/e2e/comprehensive/test-helpers.ts:285:11) at /Users/tong/Thai-acc/e2e/comprehensive/accounts.spec.ts:119:5
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/comprehensive-accounts-Cha-c2f9d-and-submit-new-account-form-ci-headless/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/comprehensive-accounts-Cha-c2f9d-and-submit-new-account-form-ci-headless/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../test-results/comprehensive-accounts-Cha-c2f9d-and-submit-new-account-form-ci-headless/error-context.md
testcase.system-out:
✅ Login successful as ACCOUNTANT ✅ Navigating directly to: /accounts Final URL: https://acc.k56mm.uk/accounts ✅ Navigated to: ผังบัญชี ✅ Filled field: รหัส = TEST844814 ✅ Filled field: ชื่อบัญชี = บัญชีทดสอบ TEST844814 ⚠️ Input not found for label: ประเภท ⚠️ Label not found: คำอธิบาย 🔔 Toast notification: ✅ Created account: TEST844814
